title: Codine
writer: Panait Istrati, Yves Jamiaque, Dumitru Carabat
actors: Alexandru Virgil Platon, Razvan Petrescu, Françoise Brion
plot: An ex-convict struggles to survive by brute force alone in a turn-of-the-century slum in Braila. Codine (Alexandre Virgil Platon) is the thug who served 10 years for murdering a friend. He returns home to his miserly mother, whose...
